name: automation-workflows
tagline: ClawHub (311★): Design and implement automation workflows to save time and scale operations as a solopreneur. Use when identifying repetiti
verdict: Consistently solid: security A, quality B, hygiene B, no major red flags. The only real gaps are bookkeeping: no version or changelog to track changes over time, and no stated 'not for' cases, so it could be reached for tasks better served by a more specific automation skill.

highlights.summary: Description and body list only positive triggers; nowhere does the skill say what it is NOT for or point to a better-suited skill for adjacent tasks (e.g. coded/CI automation, sing
No version field in frontmatter, no changelog section, and no dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
